channel.title: ScriptMasterLabs
channel.description: Payment rails and AI-native tools for the agentic web. x402 / HTTP-402, XRPL, Xahau, AI agents.

item.title: x402 Paywall — @relayos/mcp-paywall
item.description: x402 / HTTP-402 paywall middleware. Autonomous AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base. Drop-in monetization for MCP servers and APIs. XRPL and Xahau rails supported.

item.title: MasterSheets — AI spreadsheet you own
item.description: AI-native spreadsheet replacing Google Sheets. Bring your own key, no subscription, purchaser owns 100% of their data.

item.title: Trading Indicators — invite-only Pine Script v6
item.description: Invite-only Pine Script v6 indicators for squeeze detection and institutional flow analysis on AMC, GME, and 0DTE setups.

item.title: Books by Timothy Walton
item.description: Trading, neurodivergent survival systems, fiction, and modern-English ancient texts.
